label: PCA Anomaly: Multivariate
info: Detects multivariate anomalies via PCA reconstruction error and Hotelling's T².

name: Multivariate anomaly detection with PCA
info: The function node emits three normally correlated signals (temperature, vibration, and current). The pca-anomaly node learns the correlation structure over a 100-sample window and flags samples whose combined T²/SPE score exceeds 3 — including samples where each individual value looks normal but the correlation between them is broken. Anomalies are routed to output 2 together with the top contributing variables.

name: 3 correlated signals
